title: Postmasters and Mail Superintendents
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate operational, administrative, management, and support services of a U.S. post office; or coordinate activities of workers engaged in postal and related work in assigned post office.

tasks.text: Monitor employees' work schedules and attendance for payroll purposes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Organize and supervise activities, such as the processing of incoming and outgoing mail.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate operational, management, and supportive services of one or a number of postal facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hire and train employees, and evaluate their performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit detailed and summary reports of post office activities to designated supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select and train postmasters and managers of associate postal units.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform the public of available services, and of postal laws and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect rents for post office boxes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with suppliers to obtain bids for proposed purchases and to requisition supplies, disbursing funds according to federal regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
